creator: v.haisman@sh.cvut.cz
text:
Subversion works with some LANG setting and doesn't with others.
For example LANG=en_US.UTF-8 works but LANG=en_GB.UTF-8 does not.
LANG=cs_CZ.UTF-8 works too, even though Subversion doesn't seem to have
Czech translation.

How-To-Repeat: LANG=en_GB.UTF-8 svn help
